summary: Integrated ADR 0325 onto the exact-main tree by keeping `ws-0325-live-apply` active as a terminal `live_applied` workstream, regenerating the ADR 0327-compatible discovery entrypoints, onboarding packs, shard-backed ADR index surfaces, workstream registry, canonical-truth summaries, release-note and status ledgers, platform manifest, and coordination diagram from the latest `origin/main`, and carrying the ADR discovery evidence forward while the current realistic repo version remains `0.178.3` because unrelated waiver blockers still prevent a fresh numbered release cut.

verification.observed: The branch-local ADR 0325 receipt already proved the shard-backed ADR discovery rollout end to end through focused ADR tooling tests, registry and generator drift checks, reservation-aware query proofs, ownership validation, and a passing `make pre-push-gate` replay with unresolved-only local fallback, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/2026-04-03-adr-0325-adr-discovery-live-apply.json`.

verification.check: Exact-main generated discovery and canonical truth surfaces
verification.observed: `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/generate_discovery_artifacts.py --write`, `./scripts/run_python_with_packages.sh pyyaml -- scripts/generate_adr_index.py --write`, `python3 scripts/workstream_registry.py --write`, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/canonical_truth.py --write`, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/canonical_truth.py --check`, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/generate_release_notes.py --write-root-summaries`, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/generate_status_docs.py --write`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python3 scripts/platform_manifest.py --write`, and `python3 scripts/generate_diagrams.py --write` refreshed the exact-main discovery, ADR, workstream, release-note, status, manifest, and diagram surfaces, preserved in the `2026-04-04-ws-0325-mainline-*.txt` evidence files.

`uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_generate_adr_index.py tests/test_adr_query_tool.py tests/test_validation_lanes.py tests/test_workstream_registry.py tests/test_generate_discovery_artifacts.py` returned `18 passed in 1.14s`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0325-mainline-targeted-tests-r1.txt`.

`LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json` reports repository version `0.178.3`, platform version `0.130.98`, and a blocked release cut because three earlier `controller_dependency_gap` waiver receipts remain open through `2026-04-06`; `LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py --bump patch --dry-run` shows the next candidate release would be `0.178.4`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0325-mainline-release-status-r1.json` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0325-mainline-release-dry-run-r1.txt`.

verification.check: Exact-main receipt, repository, remote, and gate validation
verification.observed: `python3 scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces data-models generated-docs generated-portals`, `make remote-validate`, and `make pre-push-gate` passed on the integrated exact-main tree, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0325-mainline-live-apply-receipts-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0325-mainline-validate-repo-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0325-mainline-remote-validate-r1.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0325-mainline-pre-push-gate-r1.txt`.

notes: This mainline receipt captures the exact-main integration separately from the earlier branch-local live-apply mutation so the rebased repository-proof and the protected-surface refresh remain independently auditable.

ADR 0325 is implemented on `main`, but `Implemented In Repo Version` remains `not yet` because the global release manager still refuses a fresh version cut while unrelated open `controller_dependency_gap` waivers remain active.
The current realistic repo version remains `0.178.3`; the next candidate version would be `0.178.4` once the unrelated waiver blockers clear and a fresh release cut is allowed.
